pageContext.name: XXRAY PLUS: Brown
pageContext.description: Meet Brown from the Line Friends!   Brown might seem like an expressionless bear but he has a big heart and a shoulder you can lean on. The reliable one of the Line Friends, Brown is always there for all his friends.   Traveling to New York, Brown met Jason Freeny for the first time. The inquisitive bear poked around Freeny's studio and curiosity got the better of him - he stepped into a peculiar-looking machine! The dissection machine made a cacophony of noise and colors, then out came BROWN in a cool new look that he absolutely loves.  For the first time, the adorable Brown gets the XXRAY Plus treatment by Jason Freeny.   Dissected to reveal Brown's anatomy, see all the intricate details that lie within him - even dissected Brown still looks exceptionally cute!   An endless friendship awaits with the XXRAY Plus: Brown!
